summary: 基線盤點報告：確認現有 artifacts 路徑與 scoreboard 狀態。top-50/top-500 基線 manifest 格式已定義。scoreboard output 路徑：artifacts/data-pipeline/sanguo-rag/extracted/full-roster-scoreboard/。convergence loop output 路徑：artifacts/data-pipeline/sanguo-rag/extracted/full-roster-convergence/。baseline 格式文件已建立於 pipelines/sanguo-rag/fixtures/baseline-manifest.schema.json。
